title: Introduce plugin system for custom detectors
description: Build plugin architecture enabling third-party extensions, custom pattern definitions, and domain-specific analysis without modifying core code. Extends existing FrameworkRegistry pattern.

tasks.title: Define Plugin interface
tasks.description: Create Plugin interface with name, version, detectors[], hooks[]

tasks.title: Define Detector interface
tasks.description: Extend FrameworkDetector to general CodeDetector for any pattern

tasks.title: Create PluginRegistry
tasks.description: Build registry for loading and managing plugins

phases.title: Plugin Loader

tasks.title: npm package loader
tasks.description: Discover and load @coderef/* packages from node_modules

tasks.title: Config-based loader
tasks.description: Load plugins from coderef.config.js plugins array

tasks.title: Plugin validation
tasks.description: Validate plugin manifests and detector compatibility

success_criteria: Invalid plugins rejected with clear errors

phases.title: Integration
phases.description: Wire plugins into scanner and analyzer

tasks.title: Scanner integration
tasks.description: Execute plugin detectors during scan phase

tasks.title: Graph builder hooks
tasks.description: Allow plugins to add custom graph edges

tasks.title: CLI --plugin flag
tasks.description: Add CLI option to enable/disable specific plugins

success_criteria: Custom graph edges appear in output

tasks.title: Plugin API documentation
tasks.description: Document interfaces, manifest format, and best practices

tasks.title: Update improvements.json
tasks.description: Mark IMP-CORE-054 as done with completion notes

hard_stops.checkpoint: Plugin API interfaces approved before implementation
All three loaders (npm, local, config) validated
